title: centaurea cineraria var. busambarensis
intro: Centaurea cineraria var. busambarensis, a variant of the Silver Knapweed plant, is a flowering perennial plant native to the high-altitude regions of Busambare in Burundi. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Centaurea cineraria var. busambarensis has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and alleviating respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis. The plant's leaves and roots can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
